imax 1 number of bins
jmax 5 number of processes minus 1
kmax * number of nuisance parameters
----------------
bin           passbin1
observation   84
----------------

process                        ggHH       qqHH       ttbar      VH_hbb     vjets      ttH_hbb

rate                           5.0        0.1        13.0       14.0       19.0       1.6
